atlas v0.5
Back To Families

Contemporary Web Family

Curated Reference Directory

Index-first, browse-first, filter-friendly. The homepage acts like a visual directory rather than a manifesto.

Historical Roots

Swiss / International Typographic StylePostmodern / Memphis

Structure Fit

Catalog ExplorerNetwork Graph / Cluster

Interpretation

怎么借这条家族，而不是只模仿表面

Signature

  • scan-first cards
  • taxonomy near the top
  • thumbnail density
  • index-detail split

Borrow

  • visible browse and filter paths
  • directory framing
  • high sample density without losing scannability

Best For

  • reference atlases
  • template libraries
  • inspiration directories
  • collection sites

Avoid When

  • a strong single narrative matters most
  • there are too few entries to justify a directory

Sample Gallery

真实网站样本

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

Historical Roots

它从哪些更早的语言长出来

1950s-1970s

Switzerland

Swiss / International Typographic Style

网格、对齐、无衬线、秩序感。它是今天大量知识型、设计型、档案型网页的基础语法之一。

Descendant Families

Swiss Typographic GridEvidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
Open movement

1981-1988 and beyond

Italy

Postmodern / Memphis

反对过度理性和过度秩序，强调图案、冲突、俏皮和反规范的组合方式。

Descendant Families

Playful Postmodern / Anti-GridCurated Reference Directory
Open movement

Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格 packet

Prompt DNA

Curated Reference Directory

Use a curated reference directory family: category-forward browsing, visible filters, dense but breathable thumbnails, and a clear separation between index and detail pages.

Reference Packet

继续打开真实站点看细节

  • SiteInspire
  • Behance
  • Godly

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.
